The recipe for Savoury Mushroom Stew can be found near the oven of Bywater during the Farmers Faire. You should collect the recipe for Savoury Mushroo…
The recipe for Savoury Mushroom Stew can be found somewhere in the Bywater Farmers Market. You should read the recipe for Savoury Mushroom Stew and co…
The beef is in Bywater in the Shire, near the Farmers Faire market. You should collect the beef and add it to the stew.
The next ingredient for the stew is somewhere in the Farmers Market area of Bywater. You should search for the next ingredient for the stew.
The salt is near the oven at the Farmers Faire in Bywater. You should search for the next ingredient for the stew.
The next ingredient for the stew is somewhere in the Farmers Market area of Bywater. You should search for the next ingredient for the stew.

The carrots are near one of the vendor stalls in Bywater. You should search for the next ingredient for the stew.

Mushrooms can be found by the mushroom tent in Bywater during the Farmers Faire. You should search for the next ingredient for the stew.
The stew-pot can be found near the stove in Bywater during the Farmers Faire. You should use the stew-pot to cook the Savoury Mushroom Stew for your h…
Daisy Sandyman is at the vendor stall at the Farmers Faire in Bywater. You should bring the stew you made to Daisy Sandyman.
